name: io.github.navaganeshr/sciple-mcp
title: Sciple Platform
description: MCP server for populating and managing Sciple platform content — environments, services, observability dashboards, runbooks, projects, and tickets — via the Sciple REST API. Stdio mode uses a personal access token; HTTP mode (sciple-mcp serve) uses OAuth 2.0 with PKCE.

environmentVariables.name: SCIPLE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Sciple platform REST API, including the /api/v1 prefix. Example: http://localhost:8000/api/v1.

environmentVariables.name: SCIPLE_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Sciple personal access token (sciple_pat_...). Mint one under Profile → Access tokens in the Sciple dashboard. The token's scopes govern which tools succeed; out-of-scope calls return 403.

environmentVariables.name: SCIPLE_TENANT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Short id of the Sciple tenant the server will act against. Must equal the token's bound tenant; calls against a different tenant return 403.
